learning_moved_into_repo.teaches: Post-work bundle purpose, admission boundary, GitHub-safe policy, and required evidence.
Stable machine shape for post-work bundle manifests.
Stable machine shape for organ post-work receipts.
Stable machine shape for GitHub-safe bundle index cards.
Executable structural checks for future task bundles.
Reusable receipt template for required organs.
Narrow Custodes audit boundary without full Throne scope.

anti_pattern_prevented: Final answer as the only memory of new rules.
Document-only completion without a runnable checker.
Fake green remote proof before push.
Unindexed heavy artifact dump into GitHub.
future_reuse_instruction: Future completed tasks should create a report directory, fill the index and organ receipts, run the Administratum checker, commit, push, and then produce no-write remote equality proof.
